title: isotropis foliosa
intro: Isotropis foliosa, also known as leafy isotropis, is a type of flowering plant native to Western Australia. It is traditionally used by the local Indigenous people for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Isotropis foliosa include its potential to alleviate skin conditions such as eczema and acne, as well as its ability to soothe wounds and reduce inflammation. Isotropis foliosa is often prepared as a tea or infusion, and in some cases, it is also used in topical applications or as a tincture for its medicinal properties.
